open_question: Are Agentic AI systems simple tools or team members?
testable_question: To what extent do software engineers perceive different categories of Agentic AI as tools versus team members and which factors influence this perception?
suggested_methods: Field studies in industrial teams; controlled human-AI pair programming experiments; longitudinal surveys
potential_measures: Perceived teammate-likeness; trust; reliance; collaboration quality; role clarity

open_question: Can Agentic AI systems be considered peers or leaders?
testable_question: Under which technical and organizational conditions are Agentic AI systems accepted as peers or leaders in SE teams?
suggested_methods: Controlled experiments on coordination and planning; organizational simulations; interviews with developers and leaders
potential_measures: Acceptance of AI coordination; perceived legitimacy; accountability clarity; fairness

open_question: Is empathy important and can Agentic AI simulate soft skills?
testable_question: What is the impact of empathic or socially aware behaviors exhibited by Agentic AI on communication quality developer satisfaction and team performance?
suggested_methods: A/B experiments comparing empathic vs neutral agents; lab collaborative tasks; conversation analysis
potential_measures: Communication quality; satisfaction; psychological safety; team performance; perceived authenticity

open_question: What is the role of trust in Agentic AI for SE?
testable_question: How does developer trust in Agentic AI vary with autonomy transparency and explainability?
suggested_methods: Longitudinal studies; controlled explainability experiments; trust-in-automation questionnaires
potential_measures: Calibrated trust; over-reliance; under-reliance; willingness to delegate; contestability

open_question: What is the impact on SE education and workforce?
testable_question: How does Agentic AI with increasing autonomy affect learning outcomes skill development and professional identity?
suggested_methods: Longitudinal classroom studies; controlled educational experiments; curriculum and competency analysis
potential_measures: Learning gains; transfer; diagnostic skill; professional identity; deskilling concerns

open_question: Are social presence and soft skills still important?
testable_question: Do soft skills remain critical for effective SE teamwork in environments augmented by Agentic AI?
suggested_methods: Mixed-method field studies; group performance analysis; ethnographic observations
potential_measures: Team cohesion; informal knowledge exchange; shared understanding; mentoring quality

open_question: Do developers have a right to constrained and bounded AI?
testable_question: What governance models and regulatory mechanisms do software engineers consider acceptable for constraining or bounding Agentic AI at work?
suggested_methods: Large-scale developer surveys; cross-cultural comparative studies; policy and labor agreement analysis; participatory focus groups
potential_measures: Acceptability; perceived agency; right to contest; override expectations; governance preference
